---
name: New provider / 新增中轉站
about: Suggest a relay station, gateway, or tool to add
title: "add: <name> (<type>)"
labels: ["new-provider"]
---

<!-- English or 中文 both fine. -->

**Name / 名稱:**

**URL:** https://

**Type / 類型:** <!-- official-relay | mixed | reverse | aggregator | gateway-oss | observability | comparison | list -->

**Payment / 支付:** <!-- alipay, wechat, card, crypto, enterprise-invoice -->

**Models / 模型:** <!-- openai, anthropic, gemini, deepseek, ... -->

**Did you personally verify it works? / 你親自驗證過嗎?** <!-- yes / no -->

**One factual sentence for `notes` / 一句事實備註:**

**Source / 來源 (if making a claim):**

---
- [ ] No referral/affiliate links / 無推廣連結
- [ ] Not marketing copy / 非行銷文案
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
